stratagem.name: BASH AND GRAB
stratagem.lore: Freebooterz waste no time getting violently stuck into anyone unwise enough to try to keep prized loot out of their grasping claws.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of the loot objective, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

stratagem.name: GRAB AND BASH
stratagem.lore: Few warriors in the galaxy fight with greater brutality than a Freebooter determined to hang onto his loot.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army (excluding Gretchin units) that is within range of the loot objective.
stratagem.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle. Designer’s Note: This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.

stratagem.name: BOARDIN’ RUSH
stratagem.lore: Having cut their gold‑plated fangs storming aboard hostile warships, these Freebooterz are good at getting stuck straight into the enemy.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagem.name: DECK FRAGGERS
stratagem.lore: Invented by some sadistic Bad Mek, these shrapnel‑packed rounds of kustom ammunition are excellent for scything down tight‑packed enemy infantry.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit targets an Infantry unit with a ranged weapon, that weapon has the [BLAST] ability.

stratagem.name: ROLLING LOOT‑HEAP
stratagem.lore: Just because an enemy vehicle is still mobile and fighting doesn’t stop any suitably arrogant Flash Gitz from claiming it as their loot, especially when their snazzguns are more than capable of explosively backing up that claim.
stratagem.target: One Flash Gitz unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+] ability.

stratagem.name: KRUMP AND RUN
stratagem.lore: Freebooterz are unscrupulous pirates through and through, always on the look out for new looting opportunities and sometimes even willing to forgo a good punch up in favour of hauling away their riches.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit falls back.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army that was within engagement range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase and is not within range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
